title: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026

detail.title: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026
detail.short_info: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026 released on 5 May 2026. Apply online till 10 May for BCECE-2026. Check exam date (30-31 May), fee, eligibility, pattern & syllabus at bceceboard.bihar.gov.in.

sections.heading: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026

content.text: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026 has been released on 5 May 2026. Candidates can now apply online till 10 May 2026 on the official website bceceboard.bihar.gov.in for admission to B.Sc Nursing courses through BCECE-2026.

The Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) has officially released the notification for BCECE-2026. Online registration started on 5 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 10 May 2026.
Direct Link to Apply Online: Click Here

rows: BCECEB (Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board)

sections.heading: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026 Important Dates
BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing 2026 Eligibility Criteria

items: Nationality & Domicile: Indian Citizen and Permanent Resident of Bihar
Gender: Male & Female
Age Limit: Minimum 17 years as on 31 December 2026 (No upper age limit)
Educational Qualification: Passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English
Minimum Marks: General – 45% aggregate | SC/ST/OBC – 40% aggregate
Appearing Candidates: Eligible if appearing in 10+2 in 2026

sections.heading: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Fee 2026

content.text: Mode of Payment: Online (Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card / UPI)

sections.heading: How to Fill BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing Application Form 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official website: bceceboard.bihar.gov.in
Click on the BCECE-2026 Online Application link
Register using a valid Email ID and Mobile Number
Fill in personal, educational, and contact details
Upload scanned documents (Photo, Signature, etc.)
Pay the application fee online
Preview the form and submit
Download and print the confirmation page
Recent passport-size photograph
Signature (in black/blue ink)
Class 10th and 12th mark sheets & certificates
Bihar Domicile Certificate
Category Certificate (if applicable)
Valid Email ID and Mobile Number

sections.heading: BCECE Bihar B.Sc Nursing 2026 Exam Pattern

content.text: Duration: 4.5 hours (90 minutes per subject) Question Type: Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs) Marking Scheme: +4 for correct answer, -1 for incorrect answer
The syllabus is based on Class 11 & 12 Bihar Board / NCERT Science stream syllabus.

Physics: Kinematics, Laws of Motion, Work Energy and Power, Gravitation, Thermodynamics, Oscillations and Waves, Current Electricity, Electromagnetic Induction, Optics, Dual Nature of Matter, Atoms and Nuclei, etc.
Chemistry: Structure of Atom, Chemical Bonding, States of Matter, Thermodynamics, Equilibrium, Redox Reactions, Hydrocarbons, Biomolecules, Polymers, Environmental Chemistry, etc.

Biology: Diversity of Living Organisms, Cell Structure and Function, Plant Physiology, Human Physiology, Reproduction, Genetics and Evolution, Biotechnology, Ecology and Environment, Biology in Human Welfare, etc.
